output_contract_alignment.required_output: photoGPT_prompt_plan plus imagegen result when executed
output_contract_alignment.output_path: conversation by default; project-bound assets follow imagegen persistence
output_contract_alignment.naming_convention: <source-stem>-photogpt-plan.json for saved plans; image outputs use type suffixes
output_contract_alignment.completion_gate: type selected, JSON subtype template loaded, prompt reviewed, imagegen honored, verdict recorded
